author: jetrica
description: Create word cloud from your words with random sizes, colors, and orientations. Click on word to center it and redistribute others! - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: jetrica
manifest.description: Create word cloud from your words with random sizes, colors, and orientations. Click on word to center it and redistribute others!
manifest.name: Word Cloud

name: Word Cloud

releases.author: jetrica
releases.description:
# Word Cloud v1.0.3

Create beautiful, interactive word clouds in Obsidian!

## Features
 - Interactive word clouds with random colors, sizes, and orientations
 - Click any word to center it and regenerate the cloud
 - Auto-scaling based on word count
 - Customizable colors, fonts, spacing, and text casing
 - Full mobile support

##  Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from the assets below and place them in:
`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/word-cloud/`

Or install via Obsidian Community Plugins once approved!

## Changelog v1.0.2 -> v.1.0.3
- UI text casing changes
- some behind the scenes refactoring
- css refactoring
releases.name: Word Cloud v1.0.3

releases.author: jetrica
releases.description:
# Obsidian Word Cloud v1.0.2

Create beautiful, interactive word clouds in Obsidian!

## Features
 - Interactive word clouds with random colors, sizes, and orientations
 - Click any word to center it and regenerate the cloud
 - Auto-scaling based on word count
 - Customizable colors, fonts, spacing, and text casing
 - Full mobile support

##  Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from the assets below and place them in:
`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/word-cloud/`

Or install via Obsidian Community Plugins once approved!

## Changelog
- renamed plugin to Word Cloud
- Mobile auto-sizing now uses appropriate font sizes (~40% smaller than desktop)
- Mobile auto-spacing optimized to fit more words on small screens
- All words now visible on mobile devices with default auto settings
releases.name: Word Cloud v1.0.2

# Obsidian Word Cloud v1.0.1 
   
Create beautiful, interactive word clouds in Obsidian!

##  Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from the assets below and place them in:
`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/word-cloud/`
   
Or install via Obsidian Community Plugins once approved!
   
## Changelog

- Mobile auto-spacing optimized to fit more words on small screens
- All words now visible on mobile devices with default auto settings
